step.title: Load all planning artifacts
step.action: Read prd.md, architecture.md, epics.md from docs/planning-artifacts/.
If acceptance-tests.md or threat-model.md exist, load them as well.

step.title: Build requirement-to-epic mapping
step.action: Map each PRD requirement (FR-xxx, NFR-xxx) to its implementing epic(s).

step.title: Build epic-to-test mapping
step.action: Map each epic to its acceptance test scenario(s).

step.title: Identify gaps
step.action: Identify untraceable requirements: requirements without epics, epics without tests, architecture components without coverage.

step.title: Produce traceability matrix
step.template-output: Apply the template from template.md, filling all sections with the traceability matrix.
